import React from 'react'; import { useLocation, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaRobot, FaUser, FaCoins, FaArrowLeft } from 'react-icons/fa'; const AIResponse = () => { const location = useLocation(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const { task, response } = location.state || { task: '', response: '' }; const handlePayment = () => { // Navigate to payment page with mock data navigate('/payment', { state: { amount: 0.5, task, response } }); }; return (
{/* Header */}
{/* Chat Interface */}
{/* User Message */}
You Just now

{task}

{/* AI Response */}
AI Agent Just now 
{response}
{/* Payment Section */}

Service Fee

0.5 ALGO

); }; export default AIResponse;
